title: Shawn Mendes: For Friends and Family Only (A Live Concert Film)
original_title: Shawn Mendes: For Friends and Family Only – A Live Concert Film
overview: Filmed at the historic Bearsville Theater in Woodstock, NY, this exclusive event captures Shawn performing the album in full for the very first time. Throughout the show, Shawn shares personal stories and the inspiration behind each track, offering fans an intimate look at the creative journey that shaped the music.
